Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I cleaned up efficiently and received[n]compliments from other staff members...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A customer called me over[n]and praised my service...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was given a cup of the café's signature[n]Pheromone Coffee during my break...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A drunken businessman tried to pick a fight[n]with me, but I did my best to deal with him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I dealt with housewives complaining that[n]the Pheromone Coffee has no effect...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I found an infamous bug and got rid[n]of it before customers noticed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 10}Thanks for all your hard work. I've increased your hourly wage. Keep doing what you're doing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I'm getting the hang of things,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 10}I see you've gotten much better at serving the customers, so I'm increasing your hourly wage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I've gotten better at my work,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 10}Here's your paycheck for today. Try to use it wisely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After dealing with difficult customers,[n]I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} and[n]{f 4 30 2 1 1 0} have increased...![n]{f 1 1}
